text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The arXiv ID 2505.24871 belongs to a real paper titled "MoDoMoDo: Multi-Domain Data Mixtures for Multimodal LLM Reinforcement Learning" by Yiqing Liang et al. (10 authors). The cited title "Modomodo: Learning mixture-of-datasets with reinforcement learning for multimodal reasoning" does not exist, and none of the cited authors (Tian Liang, Xiaoyuan Liu, Pinjia He, Haitao Mi, Zhaopeng Tu, Dong Yu) match the real authors — a classic hallucinated reference grafting a fabricated title and author list onto a real ArXiv ID.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.24871
